Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `ci` / `chore` — tooling
- [ ] `security` — security-relevant change (please fill the section below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Every new source file has the `SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0` header.
- [ ] No secret / password / private key in the diff.
- [ ] Logs do not leak credentials.
- [ ] Go unit tests added or updated for new logic.
- [ ] `eebus_bridge/tests/test_config_validation.py` passes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`.
